variants.title: HiFi Filter SAO 7096 Engine Breather Filter
variants.option1Value: HiFi Filter SAO 7096 Engine Breather Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SAO 7096 Engine Breather Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SAO 7096 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: ENGINE BREATHER FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 185.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 74.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 7.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 43.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 32.0 mm

variants.title: Mann Filter LC 19 001 Positive Crankcase Ventilation | Replaces the HiFi Filter SAO 7096
variants.option1Value: Mann Filter LC 19 001 Positive Crankcase Ventilation | Replaces the HiFi Filter SAO 7096
variants.description: Reliable crankcase ventilation filters from MANN-FILTER efficiently separate oil droplets from the blow-by gasses in the crankcase. This separation protects the intake system from contamination with oil and thus maintains its reliability.
specifications: Style: Positive Crankcase Ventilation, Dimension A: 185.0 mm, Dimension B: 80.0 mm, Dimension H: 42.0 mm
